entry.title: New: BILL037(24) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Public Safety & Customer Services to International & Legal Affairs Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO OVERT VIDEO MONITORING.

Authorizes the implementation of overt video monitoring of public activity from fixed locations in and around the City rail system for the purpose of general prevention and deterrence of criminal activity. Amends the definition of “Responsible City Official” to authorize the Director of Transportation Services to implement overt video monitoring of public activity in and around the City rail system. Requires the designation of the “Responsible City Official” in resolutions approving video monitoring pursuant to Section 2-32.3(a)(7).

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Public Safety & Customer Services to International & Legal Affairs Committee.

View on the council site
